user_form_description: Update the profile details associated with your account.
user_central_auth_required: Reconnect to Krakstack Auth to manage your central account settings.
user_central_auth_reconnect_error: Could not reconnect to Krakstack Auth.
user_security_description: Protect your account with authenticator app verification.
user_two_factor_description: Use a time-based one-time password from your authenticator app.
user_two_factor_scan_description: Add this account to your authenticator app, then enter the generated code below.
user_two_factor_backup_codes_warning: Save these backup codes now. They are shown only during setup.
user_api_keys_description: Create and manage API keys for your user account.
user_api_key_create_error: Could not create the API key.
user_api_key_delete_error: Could not delete the API key.
user_api_key_created_description: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see it again.
user_accounts_description: Connect external sign-in providers to this account.
user_account_google_description: Use your Google account as a sign-in option.
user_account_revoke_description: Revoke {provider} from this account. You will not be able to use it to sign in unless you connect it again.
user_account_password_description: Use an email and password as a sign-in option.
user_account_password_connected_descript: Password sign-in is enabled for this account.
user_account_password_change_description: Update the password used to sign in with your email.
